description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push, pull request, and weekly at 4:00 AM UTC. The workflow has two jobs: test-sdist to run tests from a packaged source on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7, and test with a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS and Python versions, including ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with various Python versions, and windows-latest with some versions, installing dependencies and running tests with tox.
